title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Sun Pharmaceutical

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Sun Pharmaceutical
jsonLd.description:
Sun Pharmaceutical has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sun Pharmaceutical:
Sun Pharmaceutical is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sun Pharmaceutical!
